code: import api from'./authService';export const loanService={async getAvailableCurrencies(){const response=await api.get('/loans/currencies/');return response.data;},async calculateLoan(data){const response=await api.post('/loans/calculate/',data);return response.data;},async createApplication(data){const response=await api.post('/loans/applications/create/',data);return response.data;},async getApplications(){const response=await api.get('/loans/applications/');return response.data;},async getLoans(){const response=await api.get('/loans/');return response.data;},async getLoan(loanId){const response=await api.get("/loans/".concat(loanId,"/"));return response.data;},async getPayments(){const response=await api.get('/loans/payments/');return response.data;},async getLoanRequests(){const response=await api.get('/loans/requests/');return response.data;},async createLoanRequest(data){const response=await api.post('/loans/requests/create/',data);return response.data;},async getDashboardStats(){const response=await api.get('/loans/dashboard/stats/');return response.data;},async processApplicationPayment(applicationId){const response=await api.post("/loans/applications/".concat(applicationId,"/pay/"));return response.data;}};
